Home Lacrosse

Lacrosse Lockers

THE LOCKER ROOM

OUR LOCKERS

Premium Wood Locker Collection
6 Models Available | Quick Ship & Custom Options | 2-12 Week Delivery | Lifetime Warranty | Free Consultation

Choose from 6 premium wood locker models designed specifically for athletic teams. Our collection ranges from the essential Semi Pro and Varsity models perfect for high school teams, to our elite Pro, Stadium, Elite, and Legendary models built for collegiate and professional facilities. Every locker features premium 6-layer melamine-faced plywood construction with superior moisture resistance and fire-rated materials. Quick ship models (Stadium & Elite) deliver in 2-4 weeks, while fully custom lockers ship in 8-12 weeks with your choice of dimensions, finishes, colors, and hardware. All backed by our lifetime warranty on wood construction and 5-year materials guarantee.

Semi Pro

$349.00

View Details

Varsity

$449.00

View Details

Pro

$549.00

View Details

Stadium

$599.00

View Details

Elite

$599.00

View Details

Legendary

$599.00

View Details

THE LOCKER ROOM

READY TO UPGRADE YOUR LACROSSE LOCKER ROOM?

Custom Lacrosse Storage Solutions
Lacrosse Sticks | Helmets | Shoulder Pads | Gloves | Cleats | Goalie Gear | Uniforms | Arm Guards | Rib Pads

Custom lacrosse locker room solutions designed for professional and collegiate teams. Our wood athletic lockers provide organized storage for all your lacrosse equipment including sticks, helmets, shoulder pads, gloves, cleats, goalie gear, uniforms, and protective equipment. With 30+ years of experience building team locker rooms across the United States, we specialize in custom lacrosse storage systems that keep your practice equipment, training gear, and game day essentials organized and accessible. From high school lacrosse teams to NCAA Division I facilities, our lacrosse lockers are built to handle everything from attack sticks to goalie equipment, shoulder pads to protective gear. Expert lacrosse locker room design, installation, and customization. Free consultation, lifetime warranty on wood construction, 5-year warranty on all materials. Serving teams nationwide with custom wood lockers, team storage solutions, and complete locker room renovations.

Get Lacrosse Locker Quote
LACROSSE

Powerful Sports Theme

Built for Battle

"The will to win is important, but the will to prepare is vital."

— Joe Paterno

"Champions are made when no one is watching."

— Unknown

"Hard work beats talent when talent doesn't work hard."

— Tim Notke

PlayerStall

Luxury custom-built wood lockers with full color options. Quick ship in one month (24" & 30" widths) or custom-built in three months. 30+ years of craftsmanship.
